overall.description: First-person perspective moving through a heavily flooded urban residential street at night during a rainstorm. Abandoned vehicles including yellow taxis are partially submerged in flood waters between concrete apartment buildings with warm lights in the windows. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with atmospheric rain and lighting effects.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a flooded residential street at night, flanked by two abandoned yellow taxis partially submerged in water. Concrete apartment buildings with glowing windows line both sides while heavy rain falls and street lamps illuminate the scene.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns slightly right and advances toward a white sedan parked near the right-side apartment building. The yellow taxis fade into the distance behind as the concrete curb becomes visible on the right, with the right-side apartment building now dominating the near view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-drenched urban canyon that shifts from a wide view of submerged vehicles to a close-up approach of a single parked car. It begins by gliding through a flooded residential street, flanked by two partially submerged yellow taxis under the glow of street lamps and apartment windows. As the camera advances, the yellow taxis recede into the distance, and the perspective turns slightly right to align with the edge of the street. The scene then narrows its focus as the concrete curb becomes visible, bringing the right-side apartment building into dominant view. Finally, the movement culminates in a steady approach toward a white sedan parked against the building's facade amidst the heavy downpour.
